title: post api v1 auth login with valid credentials
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid user credentials returns a 200 status and a TokenResponse containing a JWT access token.

title: post api v1 auth login with invalid credentials
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/login with invalid user credentials returns a 401 Unauthorized status with an appropriate authentication error message.

title: post api v1 checkins with valid token and geolocation
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/checkins with a valid authentication token and valid geolocation payload returns a 200 status and a Checkin record.

title: post api v1 checkins without authentication token
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/checkins without an authentication token returns a 401 Unauthorized status.

title: post api v1 checkins with invalid or out of range geolocation
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/checkins with a valid token but invalid or out-of-range geolocation data returns a 400 or 403 error indicating check-in rejection.

title: get api v1 business with valid token
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/business with a valid authentication token returns a 200 status and the authenticated business details.

title: get api v1 business without authentication token
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/business without an authentication token returns a 401 Unauthorized status.

title: get api v1 business for unauthorized or inactive tenant
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/business with a valid token for an unauthorized or inactive tenant returns a 403 Forbidden or 404 Not Found status.
